title: Weekly quiz: Why did Dani Dyer pull out of Strictly?
content:
This week, researchers announced agroundbreaking treatment for Huntington's disease, former French president Nicolas Sarkozy was sentenced tofive years in jail, andDonald Trumpwas unhappy with his UN speech.

But how much attention did you pay to what else happened in the world over the past seven days?

Quiz collated byBen Fell.

Fancy testing your memory? Trylast week's quiz, or have a go at something fromthe archives.
